scoringPlays.text: Fernando Mendoza 8 Yd Run (Ryan Coe Kick)
Kadarius Calloway 7 Yd Run (Ryan Coe Kick)
Corey Dyches 20 Yd pass from Fernando Mendoza (Ryan Coe Kick)
Jordan Napier 40 Yd pass from Javance Tupou'ata-Johnson (Nick Lopez Kick)
Nyziah Hunter 15 Yd pass from Fernando Mendoza (Ryan Coe Kick)

videos.headline: Jaivian Thomas rips off big run to get Cal in red zone
videos.description: Jaivian Thomas breaks a tackle en route to a 37-yard run for Cal.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaivian Thomas rips off big run to get Cal in red zone) 2024/09/15 ESHEET

videos.headline: San Diego State's pick-six nullified by penalty
videos.description: San Diego State takes an interception to the house, but it's waved off due to an illegal block during the return.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (San Diego State's pick-six nullified by penalty) 2024/09/15 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kadarius Calloway rumbles into the end zone for Cal
videos.description: Cal extends its lead as Kadarius Calloway scores a touchdown from seven yards out.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kadarius Calloway rumbles into the end zone for Cal) 2024/09/15 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cal coach takes ref's mic to admonish fans for penalty
videos.description: Cal coach Justin Wilcox grabs the referee's microphone to plead with fans to stop throwing items on the field.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cal coach takes ref's mic to admonish fans for penalty) 2024/09/15 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Napier scores 40-yard receiving touchdown vs. California
videos.description: Jordan Napier scores 40-yard receiving touchdown vs. California
